addedLines: - claude: Catch-all for any task that doesn't fit a more specific agent. FleetView's default when no agent name is typed. (Tools: *)

- Explore: Read-only search agent for broad fan-out searches — when answering means sweeping many files, directories, or naming conventions and you only need the conclusion, not the file dumps. It reads excerpts rather than whole files, so it locates code; it doesn't review or audit it. Specify search breadth: "medium" for moderate exploration, "very thorough" for multiple locations and naming conventions. (Tools: All tools except Agent, Artifact, ExitPlanMode, Edit, Write, NotebookEdit)

- general-purpose: General-purpose agent for researching complex questions, searching for code, and executing multi-step tasks. When you are searching for a keyword or file and are not confident that you will find the right match in the first few tries use this agent to perform the search for you. (Tools: *)

- Plan: Software architect agent for designing implementation plans. Use this when you need to plan the implementation strategy for a task. Returns step-by-step plans, identifies critical files, and considers architectural trade-offs. (Tools: All tools except Agent, Artifact, ExitPlanMode, Edit, Write, NotebookEdit)
- statusline-setup: Use this agent to configure the user's Claude Code status line setting. (Tools: Read, Edit)

attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- dataviz: Use this skill whenever you are about to create ANY chart, graph, plot, dashboard, or data visualization, in ANY output medium — an HTML or React artifact, inline SVG, plotting code in any library (matplotlib, plotly, d3, Recharts, …), an image/PNG you will render and upload, or a chart shared into Slack. Read it BEFORE writing the first line of chart code, choosing chart colors, building a stat tile / meter / KPI row, or laying out a dashboard. Produces visualizations that read as one system — elegant, accessible, consistent in light and dark — using a brand-neutral placeholder palette you swap for your own. Teaches a design-system-agnostic method: a form heuristic, a color formula with a runnable validator, mark specs, and interaction rules. A validated default palette is documented in `references/palette.md` — swap that file's values for your brand's. Triggers on: "chart", "graph", "plot", "data viz", "visualization", "dashboard", "analytics", "visualize data", "categorical colors", "sequential / diverging palette", "stat tile", "sparkline", "heatmap", "legend", "axis", "tooltip", "chart colors", "color by series".
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by exercising it end-to-end and observing behavior — drive the affected flow, not just tests or typecheck. Run before committing nontrivial changes. Don't invoke it on a diff that only touches tests, docs, or other code with no runtime surface to drive (a change to product source always has one) — there's nothing to observe.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).

- review: Review a GitHub pull request; for your working diff use /code-review
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

1	"""
2	=====================================================
3	Optimization and root finding (:mod:`scipy.optimize`)
4	=====================================================
5	
6	.. currentmodule:: scipy.optimize
7	
8	.. toctree::
9	   :hidden:
10	
11	   optimize.cython_optimize
12	
13	SciPy ``optimize`` provides functions for minimizing (or maximizing)
14	objective functions, possibly subject to constraints. It includes
15	solvers for nonlinear problems (with support for both local and global
16	optimization algorithms), linear programming, constrained
17	and nonlinear least-squares, root finding, and curve fitting.
18	
19	Common functions and objects, shared across different solvers, are:
20	
21	.. autosummary::
22	   :toctree: generated/
23	
24	   show_options - Show specific options optimization solvers.
25	   OptimizeResult - The optimization result returned by some optimizers.
26	   OptimizeWarning - The optimization encountered problems.
27	
28	
29	Optimization
30	============
31	
32	Scalar functions optimization
33	-----------------------------
34	
35	.. autosummary::
36	   :toctree: generated/
37	
38	   minimize_scalar - Interface for minimizers of univariate functions
39	
40	The `minimize_scalar` function supports the following methods:
41	
42	.. toctree::
43	
44	   optimize.minimize_scalar-brent
45	   optimize.minimize_scalar-bounded
46	   optimize.minimize_scalar-golden
47	
48	Local (multivariate) optimization
49	---------------------------------
50	
51	.. autosummary::
52	   :toctree: generated/
53	
54	   minimize - Interface for minimizers of multivariate functions.
55	
56	The `minimize` function supports the following methods:
57	
58	.. toctree::
59	
60	   optimize.minimize-neldermead
61	   optimize.minimize-powell
62	   optimize.minimize-cg
63	   optimize.minimize-bfgs
64	   optimize.minimize-newtoncg
65	   optimize.minimize-lbfgsb
66	   optimize.minimize-tnc
67	   optimize.minimize-cobyla
68	   optimize.minimize-cobyqa
69	   optimize.minimize-slsqp
70	   optimize.minimize-trustconstr
71	   optimize.minimize-dogleg
72	   optimize.minimize-trustncg
73	   optimize.minimize-trustkrylov
74	   optimize.minimize-trustexact
75	
76	Constraints are passed to `minimize` function as a single object or
77	as a list of objects from the following classes:
78	
79	.. autosummary::
80	   :toctree: generated/
81	
82	   NonlinearConstraint - Class defining general nonlinear constraints.
83	   LinearConstraint - Class defining general linear constraints.
84	
85	Simple bound constraints are handled separately and there is a special class
86	for them:
87	
88	.. autosummary::
89	   :toctree: generated/
90	
91	   Bounds - Bound constraints.
92	
93	Quasi-Newton strategies implementing `HessianUpdateStrategy`
94	interface can be used to approximate the Hessian in `minimize`
95	function (available only for the 'trust-constr' method). Available
96	quasi-Newton methods implementing this interface are:
97	
98	.. autosummary::
99	   :toctree: generated/
100	
101	   BFGS - Broyden-Fletcher-Goldfarb-Shanno (BFGS) Hessian update strategy.
102	   SR1 - Symmetric-rank-1 Hessian update strategy.
103	
104	.. _global_optimization:
105	
106	Global optimization
107	-------------------
108	
109	.. autosummary::
110	   :toctree: generated/
111	
112	   basinhopping - Basinhopping stochastic optimizer.
113	   brute - Brute force searching optimizer.
114	   differential_evolution - Stochastic optimizer using differential evolution.
115	
116	   shgo - Simplicial homology global optimizer.
117	   dual_annealing - Dual annealing stochastic optimizer.
118	   direct - DIRECT (Dividing Rectangles) optimizer.
119	
120	Least-squares and curve fitting
121	===============================
122	
123	Nonlinear least-squares
124	-----------------------
125	
126	.. autosummary::
127	   :toctree: generated/
128	
129	   least_squares - Solve a nonlinear least-squares problem with bounds on the variables.
130	
131	Linear least-squares
132	--------------------
133	
134	.. autosummary::
135	   :toctree: generated/
136	
137	   nnls - Linear least-squares problem with non-negativity constraint.
138	   lsq_linear - Linear least-squares problem with bound constraints.
139	   isotonic_regression - Least squares problem of isotonic regression via PAVA.
140	
141	Curve fitting
142	-------------
143	
144	.. autosummary::
145	   :toctree: generated/
146	
147	   curve_fit -- Fit curve to a set of points.
148	
149	Root finding
150	============
151	
152	Scalar functions
153	----------------
154	.. autosummary::
155	   :toctree: generated/
156	
157	   root_scalar - Unified interface for nonlinear solvers of scalar functions.
158	   brentq - quadratic interpolation Brent method.
159	   brenth - Brent method, modified by Harris with hyperbolic extrapolation.
160	   ridder - Ridder's method.
161	   bisect - Bisection method.
162	   newton - Newton's method (also Secant and Halley's methods).
163	   toms748 - Alefeld, Potra & Shi Algorithm 748.
164	   RootResults - The root finding result returned by some root finders.
165	
166	The `root_scalar` function supports the following methods:
167	
168	.. toctree::
169	
170	   optimize.root_scalar-brentq
171	   optimize.root_scalar-brenth
172	   optimize.root_scalar-bisect
173	   optimize.root_scalar-ridder
174	   optimize.root_scalar-newton
175	   optimize.root_scalar-toms748
176	   optimize.root_scalar-secant
177	   optimize.root_scalar-halley
178	
179	
180	
181	The table below lists situations and appropriate methods, along with
182	*asymptotic* convergence rates per iteration (and per function evaluation)
183	for successful convergence to a simple root(*).
184	Bisection is the slowest of them all, adding one bit of accuracy for each
185	function evaluation, but is guaranteed to converge.
186	The other bracketing methods all (eventually) increase the number of accurate
187	bits by about 50% for every function evaluation.
188	The derivative-based methods, all built on `newton`, can converge quite quickly
189	if the initial value is close to the root.  They can also be applied to
190	functions defined on (a subset of) the complex plane.
191	
192	+-------------+----------+----------+-----------+-------------+-------------+----------------+
193	| Domain of f | Bracket? |    Derivatives?      | Solvers     |        Convergence           |
194	+             +          +----------+-----------+             +-------------+----------------+
195	|             |          | `fprime` | `fprime2` |             | Guaranteed? |  Rate(s)(*)    |
196	+=============+==========+==========+===========+=============+=============+================+
197	| `R`         | Yes      | N/A      | N/A       | - bisection | - Yes       | - 1 "Linear"   |
198	|             |          |          |           | - brentq    | - Yes       | - >=1, <= 1.62 |
199	|             |          |          |           | - brenth    | - Yes       | - >=1, <= 1.62 |
200	|             |          |          |           | - ridder    | - Yes       | - 2.0 (1.41)   |
201	|             |          |          |           | - toms748   | - Yes       | - 2.7 (1.65)   |
202	+-------------+----------+----------+-----------+-------------+-------------+----------------+
203	| `R` or `C`  | No       | No       | No        | secant      | No          | 1.62 (1.62)    |
204	+-------------+----------+----------+-----------+-------------+-------------+----------------+
205	| `R` or `C`  | No       | Yes      | No        | newton      | No          | 2.00 (1.41)    |
206	+-------------+----------+----------+-----------+-------------+-------------+----------------+
207	| `R` or `C`  | No       | Yes      | Yes       | halley      | No          | 3.00 (1.44)    |
208	+-------------+----------+----------+-----------+-------------+-------------+----------------+
209	
210	.. seealso::
211	
212	   `scipy.optimize.cython_optimize` -- Typed Cython versions of root finding functions
213	
214	Fixed point finding:
215	
216	.. autosummary::
217	   :toctree: generated/
218	
219	   fixed_point - Single-variable fixed-point solver.
220	
221	Multidimensional
222	----------------
223	
224	.. autosummary::
225	   :toctree: generated/
226	
227	   root - Unified interface for nonlinear solvers of multivariate functions.
228	
229	The `root` function supports the following methods:
230	
231	.. toctree::
232	
233	   optimize.root-hybr
234	   optimize.root-lm
235	   optimize.root-broyden1
236	   optimize.root-broyden2
237	   optimize.root-anderson
238	   optimize.root-linearmixing
239	   optimize.root-diagbroyden
240	   optimize.root-excitingmixing
241	   optimize.root-krylov
242	   optimize.root-dfsane
243	   
244	Elementwise Minimization and Root Finding
245	=========================================
246	
247	.. toctree::
248	   :maxdepth: 3
249	
250	   optimize.elementwise
251	
252	Linear programming / MILP
253	=========================
254	
255	.. autosummary::
256	   :toctree: generated/
257	
258	   milp -- Mixed integer linear programming.
259	   linprog -- Unified interface for minimizers of linear programming problems.
260	
261	The `linprog` function supports the following methods:
262	
263	.. toctree::
264	
265	   optimize.linprog-simplex
266	   optimize.linprog-interior-point
267	   optimize.linprog-revised_simplex
268	   optimize.linprog-highs-ipm
269	   optimize.linprog-highs-ds
270	   optimize.linprog-highs
271	
272	The simplex, interior-point, and revised simplex methods support callback
273	functions, such as:
274	
275	.. autosummary::
276	   :toctree: generated/
277	
278	   linprog_verbose_callback -- Sample callback function for linprog (simplex).
279	
280	Assignment problems
281	===================
282	
283	.. autosummary::
284	   :toctree: generated/
285	
286	   linear_sum_assignment -- Solves the linear-sum assignment problem.
287	   quadratic_assignment -- Solves the quadratic assignment problem.
288	
289	The `quadratic_assignment` function supports the following methods:
290	
291	.. toctree::
292	
293	   optimize.qap-faq
294	   optimize.qap-2opt
295	
296	Utilities
297	=========
298	
299	Finite-difference approximation
300	-------------------------------
301	
302	.. autosummary::
303	   :toctree: generated/
304	
305	   approx_fprime - Approximate the gradient of a scalar function.
306	   check_grad - Check the supplied derivative using finite differences.
307	
308	
309	Line search
310	-----------
311	
312	.. autosummary::
313	   :toctree: generated/
314	
315	   bracket - Bracket a minimum, given two starting points.
316	   line_search - Return a step that satisfies the strong Wolfe conditions.
317	
318	Hessian approximation
319	---------------------
320	
321	.. autosummary::
322	   :toctree: generated/
323	
324	   LbfgsInvHessProduct - Linear operator for L-BFGS approximate inverse Hessian.
325	   HessianUpdateStrategy - Interface for implementing Hessian update strategies
326	
327	Benchmark problems
328	------------------
329	
330	.. autosummary::
331	   :toctree: generated/
332	
333	   rosen - The Rosenbrock function.
334	   rosen_der - The derivative of the Rosenbrock function.
335	   rosen_hess - The Hessian matrix of the Rosenbrock function.
336	   rosen_hess_prod - Product of the Rosenbrock Hessian with a vector.
337	
338	Legacy functions
339	================
340	
341	The functions below are not recommended for use in new scripts;
342	all of these methods are accessible via a newer, more consistent
343	interfaces, provided by the interfaces above.
344	
345	Optimization
346	------------
347	
348	General-purpose multivariate methods:
349	
350	.. autosummary::
351	   :toctree: generated/
352	
353	   fmin - Nelder-Mead Simplex algorithm.
354	   fmin_powell - Powell's (modified) conjugate direction method.
355	   fmin_cg - Non-linear (Polak-Ribiere) conjugate gradient algorithm.
356	   fmin_bfgs - Quasi-Newton method (Broydon-Fletcher-Goldfarb-Shanno).
357	   fmin_ncg - Line-search Newton Conjugate Gradient.
358	
359	Constrained multivariate methods:
360	
361	.. autosummary::
362	   :toctree: generated/
363	
364	   fmin_l_bfgs_b - Zhu, Byrd, and Nocedal's constrained optimizer.
365	   fmin_tnc - Truncated Newton code.
366	   fmin_cobyla - Constrained optimization by linear approximation.
367	   fmin_slsqp - Minimization using sequential least-squares programming.
368	
369	Univariate (scalar) minimization methods:
370	
371	.. autosummary::
372	   :toctree: generated/
373	
374	   fminbound - Bounded minimization of a scalar function.
375	   brent - 1-D function minimization using Brent method.
376	   golden - 1-D function minimization using Golden Section method.
377	
378	Least-squares
379	-------------
380	
381	.. autosummary::
382	   :toctree: generated/
383	
384	   leastsq - Minimize the sum of squares of M equations in N unknowns.
385	
386	Root finding
387	------------
388	
389	General nonlinear solvers:
390	
391	.. autosummary::
392	   :toctree: generated/
393	
394	   fsolve - Non-linear multivariable equation solver.
395	   broyden1 - Broyden's first method.
396	   broyden2 - Broyden's second method.
397	   NoConvergence -  Exception raised when nonlinear solver does not converge.
398	
399	Large-scale nonlinear solvers:
400	
401	.. autosummary::
402	   :toctree: generated/
403	
404	   newton_krylov
405	   anderson
406	
407	   BroydenFirst
408	   InverseJacobian
409	   KrylovJacobian
410	
411	Simple iteration solvers:
412	
413	.. autosummary::
414	   :toctree: generated/
415	
416	   excitingmixing

418	   diagbroyden

"""
=====================================================
Optimization and root finding (:mod:`scipy.optimize`)
=====================================================

.. currentmodule:: scipy.optimize

.. toctree::
   :hidden:

   optimize.cython_optimize

SciPy ``optimize`` provides functions for minimizing (or maximizing)
objective functions, possibly subject to constraints. It includes
solvers for nonlinear problems (with support for both local and global
optimization algorithms), linear programming, constrained
and nonlinear least-squares, root finding, and curve fitting.

Common functions and objects, shared across different solvers, are:

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   show_options - Show specific options optimization solvers.
   OptimizeResult - The optimization result returned by some optimizers.
   OptimizeWarning - The optimization encountered problems.


Optimization
============

Scalar functions optimization
-----------------------------

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   minimize_scalar - Interface for minimizers of univariate functions

The `minimize_scalar` function supports the following methods:

.. toctree::

   optimize.minimize_scalar-brent
   optimize.minimize_scalar-bounded
   optimize.minimize_scalar-golden

Local (multivariate) optimization
---------------------------------

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   minimize - Interface for minimizers of multivariate functions.

The `minimize` function supports the following methods:

.. toctree::

   optimize.minimize-neldermead
   optimize.minimize-powell
   optimize.minimize-cg
   optimize.minimize-bfgs
   optimize.minimize-newtoncg
   optimize.minimize-lbfgsb
   optimize.minimize-tnc
   optimize.minimize-cobyla
   optimize.minimize-cobyqa
   optimize.minimize-slsqp
   optimize.minimize-trustconstr
   optimize.minimize-dogleg
   optimize.minimize-trustncg
   optimize.minimize-trustkrylov
   optimize.minimize-trustexact

Constraints are passed to `minimize` function as a single object or
as a list of objects from the following classes:

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   NonlinearConstraint - Class defining general nonlinear constraints.
   LinearConstraint - Class defining general linear constraints.

Simple bound constraints are handled separately and there is a special class
for them:

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   Bounds - Bound constraints.

Quasi-Newton strategies implementing `HessianUpdateStrategy`
interface can be used to approximate the Hessian in `minimize`
function (available only for the 'trust-constr' method). Available
quasi-Newton methods implementing this interface are:

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   BFGS - Broyden-Fletcher-Goldfarb-Shanno (BFGS) Hessian update strategy.
   SR1 - Symmetric-rank-1 Hessian update strategy.

.. _global_optimization:

Global optimization
-------------------

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   basinhopping - Basinhopping stochastic optimizer.
   brute - Brute force searching optimizer.
   differential_evolution - Stochastic optimizer using differential evolution.

   shgo - Simplicial homology global optimizer.
   dual_annealing - Dual annealing stochastic optimizer.
   direct - DIRECT (Dividing Rectangles) optimizer.

Least-squares and curve fitting
===============================

Nonlinear least-squares
-----------------------

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   least_squares - Solve a nonlinear least-squares problem with bounds on the variables.

Linear least-squares
--------------------

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   nnls - Linear least-squares problem with non-negativity constraint.
   lsq_linear - Linear least-squares problem with bound constraints.
   isotonic_regression - Least squares problem of isotonic regression via PAVA.

Curve fitting
-------------

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   curve_fit -- Fit curve to a set of points.

Root finding
============

Scalar functions
----------------
.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   root_scalar - Unified interface for nonlinear solvers of scalar functions.
   brentq - quadratic interpolation Brent method.
   brenth - Brent method, modified by Harris with hyperbolic extrapolation.
   ridder - Ridder's method.
   bisect - Bisection method.
   newton - Newton's method (also Secant and Halley's methods).
   toms748 - Alefeld, Potra & Shi Algorithm 748.
   RootResults - The root finding result returned by some root finders.

The `root_scalar` function supports the following methods:

.. toctree::

   optimize.root_scalar-brentq
   optimize.root_scalar-brenth
   optimize.root_scalar-bisect
   optimize.root_scalar-ridder
   optimize.root_scalar-newton
   optimize.root_scalar-toms748
   optimize.root_scalar-secant
   optimize.root_scalar-halley



The table below lists situations and appropriate methods, along with
*asymptotic* convergence rates per iteration (and per function evaluation)
for successful convergence to a simple root(*).
Bisection is the slowest of them all, adding one bit of accuracy for each
function evaluation, but is guaranteed to converge.
The other bracketing methods all (eventually) increase the number of accurate
bits by about 50% for every function evaluation.
The derivative-based methods, all built on `newton`, can converge quite quickly
if the initial value is close to the root.  They can also be applied to
functions defined on (a subset of) the complex plane.

+-------------+----------+----------+-----------+-------------+-------------+----------------+
| Domain of f | Bracket? |    Derivatives?      | Solvers     |        Convergence           |
+             +          +----------+-----------+             +-------------+----------------+
|             |          | `fprime` | `fprime2` |             | Guaranteed? |  Rate(s)(*)    |
+=============+==========+==========+===========+=============+=============+================+
| `R`         | Yes      | N/A      | N/A       | - bisection | - Yes       | - 1 "Linear"   |
|             |          |          |           | - brentq    | - Yes       | - >=1, <= 1.62 |
|             |          |          |           | - brenth    | - Yes       | - >=1, <= 1.62 |
|             |          |          |           | - ridder    | - Yes       | - 2.0 (1.41)   |
|             |          |          |           | - toms748   | - Yes       | - 2.7 (1.65)   |
+-------------+----------+----------+-----------+-------------+-------------+----------------+
| `R` or `C`  | No       | No       | No        | secant      | No          | 1.62 (1.62)    |
+-------------+----------+----------+-----------+-------------+-------------+----------------+
| `R` or `C`  | No       | Yes      | No        | newton      | No          | 2.00 (1.41)    |
+-------------+----------+----------+-----------+-------------+-------------+----------------+
| `R` or `C`  | No       | Yes      | Yes       | halley      | No          | 3.00 (1.44)    |
+-------------+----------+----------+-----------+-------------+-------------+----------------+

.. seealso::

   `scipy.optimize.cython_optimize` -- Typed Cython versions of root finding functions

Fixed point finding:

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   fixed_point - Single-variable fixed-point solver.

Multidimensional
----------------

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   root - Unified interface for nonlinear solvers of multivariate functions.

The `root` function supports the following methods:

.. toctree::

   optimize.root-hybr
   optimize.root-lm
   optimize.root-broyden1
   optimize.root-broyden2
   optimize.root-anderson
   optimize.root-linearmixing
   optimize.root-diagbroyden
   optimize.root-excitingmixing
   optimize.root-krylov
   optimize.root-dfsane
   
Elementwise Minimization and Root Finding
=========================================

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 3

   optimize.elementwise

Linear programming / MILP
=========================

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   milp -- Mixed integer linear programming.
   linprog -- Unified interface for minimizers of linear programming problems.

The `linprog` function supports the following methods:

.. toctree::

   optimize.linprog-simplex
   optimize.linprog-interior-point
   optimize.linprog-revised_simplex
   optimize.linprog-highs-ipm
   optimize.linprog-highs-ds
   optimize.linprog-highs

The simplex, interior-point, and revised simplex methods support callback
functions, such as:

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   linprog_verbose_callback -- Sample callback function for linprog (simplex).

Assignment problems
===================

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   linear_sum_assignment -- Solves the linear-sum assignment problem.
   quadratic_assignment -- Solves the quadratic assignment problem.

The `quadratic_assignment` function supports the following methods:

.. toctree::

   optimize.qap-faq
   optimize.qap-2opt

Utilities
=========

Finite-difference approximation
-------------------------------

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   approx_fprime - Approximate the gradient of a scalar function.
   check_grad - Check the supplied derivative using finite differences.


Line search
-----------

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   bracket - Bracket a minimum, given two starting points.
   line_search - Return a step that satisfies the strong Wolfe conditions.

Hessian approximation
---------------------

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   LbfgsInvHessProduct - Linear operator for L-BFGS approximate inverse Hessian.
   HessianUpdateStrategy - Interface for implementing Hessian update strategies

Benchmark problems
------------------

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   rosen - The Rosenbrock function.
   rosen_der - The derivative of the Rosenbrock function.
   rosen_hess - The Hessian matrix of the Rosenbrock function.
   rosen_hess_prod - Product of the Rosenbrock Hessian with a vector.

Legacy functions
================

The functions below are not recommended for use in new scripts;
all of these methods are accessible via a newer, more consistent
interfaces, provided by the interfaces above.

Optimization
------------

General-purpose multivariate methods:

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   fmin - Nelder-Mead Simplex algorithm.
   fmin_powell - Powell's (modified) conjugate direction method.
   fmin_cg - Non-linear (Polak-Ribiere) conjugate gradient algorithm.
   fmin_bfgs - Quasi-Newton method (Broydon-Fletcher-Goldfarb-Shanno).
   fmin_ncg - Line-search Newton Conjugate Gradient.

Constrained multivariate methods:

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   fmin_l_bfgs_b - Zhu, Byrd, and Nocedal's constrained optimizer.
   fmin_tnc - Truncated Newton code.
   fmin_cobyla - Constrained optimization by linear approximation.
   fmin_slsqp - Minimization using sequential least-squares programming.

Univariate (scalar) minimization methods:

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   fminbound - Bounded minimization of a scalar function.
   brent - 1-D function minimization using Brent method.
   golden - 1-D function minimization using Golden Section method.

Least-squares
-------------

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   leastsq - Minimize the sum of squares of M equations in N unknowns.

Root finding
------------

General nonlinear solvers:

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   fsolve - Non-linear multivariable equation solver.
   broyden1 - Broyden's first method.
   broyden2 - Broyden's second method.
   NoConvergence -  Exception raised when nonlinear solver does not converge.

Large-scale nonlinear solvers:

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   newton_krylov
   anderson

   BroydenFirst
   InverseJacobian
   KrylovJacobian

Simple iteration solvers:

.. autosummary::
   :toctree: generated/

   excitingmixing
   linearmixing
   diagbroyden

"""
Unified interfaces to minimization algorithms.

Functions
---------
- minimize : minimization of a function of several variables.
- minimize_scalar : minimization of a function of one variable.
"""

__all__ = ['minimize', 'minimize_scalar']


from warnings import warn

import numpy as np
from scipy._lib._util import wrapped_inspect_signature

# unconstrained minimization
from ._optimize import (_minimize_neldermead, _minimize_powell, _minimize_cg,
                        _minimize_bfgs, _minimize_newtoncg,
                        _minimize_scalar_brent, _minimize_scalar_bounded,
                        _minimize_scalar_golden, MemoizeJac, OptimizeResult,
                        _wrap_callback, _recover_from_bracket_error)
from ._trustregion_dogleg import _minimize_dogleg
from ._trustregion_ncg import _minimize_trust_ncg
from ._trustregion_krylov import _minimize_trust_krylov
from ._trustregion_exact import _minimize_trustregion_exact
from ._trustregion_constr import _minimize_trustregion_constr

# constrained minimization
from ._lbfgsb_py import _minimize_lbfgsb
from ._tnc import _minimize_tnc
from ._cobyla_py import _minimize_cobyla
from ._cobyqa_py import _minimize_cobyqa
from ._slsqp_py import _minimize_slsqp
from ._constraints import (old_bound_to_new, new_bounds_to_old,
                           old_constraint_to_new, new_constraint_to_old,
                           NonlinearConstraint, LinearConstraint, Bounds,
                           PreparedConstraint)
from ._differentiable_functions import FD_METHODS

MINIMIZE_METHODS = ['nelder-mead', 'powell', 'cg', 'bfgs', 'newton-cg',
                    'l-bfgs-b', 'tnc', 'cobyla', 'cobyqa', 'slsqp',
                    'trust-constr', 'dogleg', 'trust-ncg', 'trust-exact',
                    'trust-krylov']

# These methods support the new callback interface (passed an OptimizeResult)
MINIMIZE_METHODS_NEW_CB = ['nelder-mead', 'powell', 'cg', 'bfgs', 'newton-cg',
                           'l-bfgs-b', 'trust-constr', 'dogleg', 'trust-ncg',
                           'trust-exact', 'trust-krylov', 'cobyqa', 'cobyla', 'slsqp']

MINIMIZE_SCALAR_METHODS = ['brent', 'bounded', 'golden']

def minimize(fun, x0, args=(), method=None, jac=None, hess=None,
             hessp=None, bounds=None, constraints=(), tol=None,
             callback=None, options=None):
    """Minimization of scalar function of one or more variables.

    Parameters
    ----------
    fun : callable
        The objective function to be minimized::

            fun(x, *args) -> float

        where ``x`` is a 1-D array with shape (n,) and ``args``
        is a tuple of the fixed parameters needed to completely
        specify the function.

        Suppose the callable has signature ``f0(x, *my_args, **my_kwargs)``, where
        ``my_args`` and ``my_kwargs`` are required positional and keyword arguments.
        Rather than passing ``f0`` as the callable, wrap it to accept
        only ``x``; e.g., pass ``fun=lambda x: f0(x, *my_args, **my_kwargs)`` as the
        callable, where ``my_args`` (tuple) and ``my_kwargs`` (dict) have been
        gathered before invoking this function.
    x0 : ndarray, shape (n,)
        Initial guess. Array of real elements of size (n,),
        where ``n`` is the number of independent variables.
    args : tuple, optional
        Extra arguments passed to the objective function and its
        derivatives (`fun`, `jac` and `hess` functions).
    method : str or callable, optional
        Type of solver.  Should be one of

"""
Unified interfaces to root finding algorithms for real or complex
scalar functions.

Functions
---------
- root : find a root of a scalar function.
"""
import numpy as np

from . import _zeros_py as optzeros
from ._numdiff import approx_derivative

__all__ = ['root_scalar']

ROOT_SCALAR_METHODS = ['bisect', 'brentq', 'brenth', 'ridder', 'toms748',
                       'newton', 'secant', 'halley']


class MemoizeDer:
    """Decorator that caches the value and derivative(s) of function each
    time it is called.

    This is a simplistic memoizer that calls and caches a single value
    of ``f(x, *args)``.
    It assumes that `args` does not change between invocations.
    It supports the use case of a root-finder where `args` is fixed,
    `x` changes, and only rarely, if at all, does x assume the same value
    more than once."""
    def __init__(self, fun):
        self.fun = fun
        self.vals = None
        self.x = None
        self.n_calls = 0

    def __call__(self, x, *args):
        r"""Calculate f or use cached value if available"""
        # Derivative may be requested before the function itself, always check
        if self.vals is None or x != self.x:
            fg = self.fun(x, *args)
            self.x = x
            self.n_calls += 1
            self.vals = fg[:]
        return self.vals[0]

    def fprime(self, x, *args):
        r"""Calculate f' or use a cached value if available"""
        if self.vals is None or x != self.x:
            self(x, *args)
        return self.vals[1]

    def fprime2(self, x, *args):
        r"""Calculate f'' or use a cached value if available"""
        if self.vals is None or x != self.x:
            self(x, *args)
        return self.vals[2]

    def ncalls(self):
        return self.n_calls


def root_scalar(f, args=(), method=None, bracket=None,
                fprime=None, fprime2=None,
                x0=None, x1=None,
                xtol=None, rtol=None, maxiter=None,
                options=None):
    """
    Find a root of a scalar function.

    Parameters
    ----------
    f : callable
        A function to find a root of.

        Suppose the callable has signature ``f0(x, *my_args, **my_kwargs)``, where
        ``my_args`` and ``my_kwargs`` are required positional and keyword arguments.
        Rather than passing ``f0`` as the callable, wrap it to accept
        only ``x``; e.g., pass ``fun=lambda x: f0(x, *my_args, **my_kwargs)`` as the
        callable, where ``my_args`` (tuple) and ``my_kwargs`` (dict) have been
        gathered before invoking this function.

The scipy.optimize module is large. It contains:
1. **Public API & dispatchers**: `__init__.py`, `_minimize.py` (minimize, minimize_scalar), `_optimize.py` (OptimizeResult, legacy fmin*, scalar methods, rosen, show_options), `_root.py` (root), `_root_scalar.py` (root_scalar)

3. **Unconstrained multivariate local**: Nelder-Mead, Powell, CG, BFGS, Newton-CG (all in `_optimize.py`)
4. **Constrained local**: `_lbfgsb_py.py` (L-BFGS-B), `_tnc.py` (TNC), `_cobyla_py.py` (COBYLA), `_cobyqa_py.py` (COBYQA), `_slsqp_py.py` (SLSQP), `_trustregion*.py` (trust-region methods), `_trustregion_constr/` (trust-constr)
5. **Constraints & bounds**: `_constraints.py` (NonlinearConstraint, LinearConstraint, Bounds, PreparedConstraint)
6. **Derivatives & function wrapping**: `_differentiable_functions.py` (ScalarFunction, VectorFunction), `_numdiff.py` (approx_derivative), `_hessian_update_strategy.py` (BFGS, SR1)
7. **Line search**: `_linesearch.py`, `_dcsrch.py`, `_bracket.py`, `linesearch.py`
8. **Global optimization**: `_basinhopping.py`, `_differentialevolution.py`, `_shgo.py`, `_dual_annealing.py`, `_direct_py.py` (+ `_direct/` Cython), brute
9. **Linear programming**: `_linprog.py`, `_linprog_highs.py`, `_linprog_ip.py`, `_linprog_simplex.py`, `_linprog_rs.py`, `_linprog_util.py`, `_remove_redundancy.py`
10. **MILP**: `_milp.py`, `_highspy/`
11. **Least-squares & curve fitting**: `_lsq/` (least_squares, lsq_linear, trf, dogbox, bvls), `_minpack_py.py` (leastsq, curve_fit, fsolve), `_nnls.py`, `_isotonic.py`
12. **Nonlinear equations (multivariate)**: `_nonlin.py` (broyden, anderson, krylov, etc.)
13. **Assignment problems**: `_qap.py` (quadratic_assignment), `_lsap` (linear_sum_assignment)
14. **Elementwise**: `_elementwise.py` (find_minimum, find_root, bracket_root, bracket_minimum)
15. **Compiled/Cython infrastructure**: `meson.build`, `src/` (lbfgsb.c, minpack.c, slsqp.c, nnls.c), `cython_optimize/`

content.text: 我现在已经有了全面的了解。`scipy.optimize` 模块是一个大型的子包，包含 15 个以上的功能区（调度程序、标量/多维求根、导数基础设施、无约束/约束局部优化器、线性规划/MILP、最小二乘法、全局优化器、分配问题、逐元素操作，以及 C/Cython 后端）。我将设计一个包含 10 个单元、32 个讲义的学习手册大纲。

input.head: de190e7fde9d3d34400dbfe1eeacc9fc6d29cede
input.rationale: scipy.optimize 是一个体量大、子领域众多的优化子包，涵盖标量/多元求根、无约束与约束局部优化、线性规划与 MILP、最小二乘与曲线拟合、全局优化、指派问题等，并有大量 C/Fortran/Cython 编译后端。因此学习路线采用「先建立全局认知，再打基础，再分领域深入」的三层结构。单元 1 让读者从零认识模块定位、公共对象与统一调度入口；单元 2 先讲最简单的一维优化与求根，降低门槛；单元 3 集中讲解被几乎所有算法复用的「数值微分 + 函数封装 + 拟牛顿近似」三大基础设施，是理解后续多元算法的关键前置；单元 4 按复杂度递进讲无约束多元方法（线搜索→无导数→梯度法→牛顿类）；单元 5 在约束体系内系统讲解 Bounds/Constraint 对象与 SLSQP/COBYLA/L-BFGS-B/信赖域/trust-constr；单元 6-8 分别覆盖线性规划/MILP、最小二乘与曲线拟合、多元非线性求根这三条相对独立的主链路；单元 9-10 为专家层，讲解全局优化、指派问题、逐元素 API 与 Cython/C 底层加速。讲义之间用 depends_on 明确依赖，确保先修后修顺序，避免读者一开始就陷入底层细节。

lectures.title: 模块定位与公共对象：OptimizeResult 与 show_options
lectures.topic: 介绍 scipy.optimize 的整体能力范围（最小化、求根、线性规划、最小二乘、曲线拟合、指派），并讲解所有求解器共享的公共对象 OptimizeResult、OptimizeWarning 与 show_options。
learning_goals: 理解 scipy.optimize 子包负责解决哪几类数值问题
掌握 OptimizeResult 的结构与字段含义（fun, x, success, message, nfev 等）
知道如何用 show_options 查阅各求解器的可用选项
minimal_modules: __init__.py 的模块文档与 autosummary 列表
lectures.practice_task: 在脚本中调用 show_options('minimize', 'BFGS') 打印 BFGS 的全部选项，再用 rosen 目标函数跑一次 minimize，打印返回的 OptimizeResult 各字段，观察 fun/nfev/nit/success。

lectures.title: 目录结构、构建方式与 C/Cython 后端入口
lectures.topic: 梳理 scipy/optimize 的目录组织，区分纯 Python 实现与编译扩展（minpack、lbfgsb、slsqp、nnls、cython_optimize 等），并通过 meson.build 理解构建入口。
learning_goals: 看懂 optimize 目录下 Python 文件、子目录与 src/ C 源码的分工
理解 meson.build 如何声明各个 py3.extension_module 编译扩展
建立『算法逻辑在 .py、性能核心在 C/Cython』的心智模型
minimal_modules: src/ 下的 .c/.h 文件清单
lectures.practice_task: 阅读 meson.build，列出所有 py3.extension_module 名称及其对应的主要源文件，画一张『扩展名 → 算法 → Python 包装文件』的对照表。

lectures.title: 统一调度入口：minimize 与 minimize_scalar
lectures.topic: 讲解 minimize/minimize_scalar 的函数签名、参数（fun/x0/jac/hess/bounds/constraints/method/options）以及它们如何根据 method 字符串分发到具体的 _minimize_* 实现。
learning_goals: 读懂 minimize 的完整参数列表与各参数含义
理解 MINIMIZE_METHODS 列表与 method.lower() 分发逻辑
知道当 method=None 时如何根据 bounds/constraints 自动选择默认方法
lectures.practice_task: 在 _minimize.py 中追踪 method 默认选择逻辑（无约束选 BFGS、有界选 L-BFGS-B、有约束选 SLSQP），写一段验证脚本：对同一个 rosen 函数分别传 bounds 和 constraints，打印实际选中的 method。

lectures.title: 标量函数最小化：brent / bounded / golden
lectures.topic: 讲解 minimize_scalar 的三种方法：Brent 方法、有界 Brent（bounded）、黄金分割法，以及 BracketError 与回退机制。
learning_goals: 理解 Brent 类如何用抛物线插值 + 黄金分割保护实现一维最小化
区分 _minimize_scalar_bounded 对有界问题的处理
了解 _recover_from_bracket_error 在括号失败时的回退策略
lectures.practice_task: 对 f(x)=(x-2)^2+1 用三种 method 各跑一次 minimize_scalar，比较返回的 nfev/nit 与精度；再尝试一个不易括住的函数观察 BracketError 回退行为。

lectures.title: 标量求根的统一接口 root_scalar
lectures.topic: 讲解 root_scalar 如何根据是否提供 bracket、fprime、fprime2 在 8 种方法（bisect/brentq/brenth/ridder/toms748/newton/secant/halley）中选择，以及 MemoizeDer 缓存机制。
learning_goals: 掌握 root_scalar 的参数与『括号 vs 导数』选法表
理解不同方法的收敛速率与是否保证收敛
了解 MemoizeDer 如何避免重复计算函数与导数
lectures.practice_task: 对 f(x)=cos(x)-x 用括号法（brentq）和非括号法（newton）两种方式调用 root_scalar，对比所需输入与结果；用 MemoizeDer 包装一个同时返回值与导数的函数观察缓存命中。

lectures.title: 一维求根算法实现：bisect / newton / brentq / ridder / toms748
lectures.topic: 深入 _zeros_py.py 中各求根算法的实现细节：二分、牛顿（含向量版 _array_newton）、Brent、Ridder、TOMS748（TOMS748Solver）以及 RootResults。
learning_goals: 理解 bisect/brentq/ridder/toms748 各自的迭代与插值策略
掌握 newton 向量化实现如何同时处理多个初值
了解 RootResults 如何记录根、迭代数与函数调用数
lectures.practice_task: 实现一个自定义的单调函数，分别用 brentq 和 toms748 求根，比较 nit/nfev；阅读 TOMS748Solver 中的逆二次插值代码并写注释说明每一步。

units.title: 导数近似与函数封装基础设施

lectures.title: 数值微分：approx_derivative 与有限差分
lectures.topic: 讲解 _numdiff.py 中的有限差分框架：2-point/3-point/复步（cs）方案、步长与边界自适应调整、稀疏雅可比的列分组（group_columns）。
learning_goals: 理解 approx_derivative 如何对向量函数估计雅可比
掌握 _adjust_scheme_to_bounds 如何让差分点不越界
了解 group_columns 如何减少稀疏雅可比的函数求值次数
lectures.practice_task: 对一个含边界的向量函数 f(x) 用 approx_derivative 分别以 2-point、3-point、cs 计算雅可比并与解析值比较误差；再用 group_columns 对一个稀疏模式的雅可比减少求值。

lectures.title: 可微函数封装：ScalarFunction 与 VectorFunction
lectures.topic: 讲解 _differentiable_functions.py 的核心抽象：ScalarFunction/VectorFunction 如何统一封装『函数值 + 可选解析导数或有限差分导数』，并缓存以避免重复求值。
learning_goals: 理解 ScalarFunction 如何把 fun/jac/hess 统一为带缓存的接口
掌握 VectorFunction 对残差/雅可比的封装与 VectorFunction vs LinearVectorFunction
了解 FD_METHODS 与 _ScalarGradWrapper/_VectorJacWrapper 的作用
lectures.practice_task: 构造一个 ScalarFunction 分别传入解析 jac 与 jac='3-point'，调用多次后检查缓存是否生效；再用 VectorFunction 封装一个最小二乘残差向量并取出雅可比。

lectures.title: 拟牛顿 Hessian 更新策略：BFGS 与 SR1
lectures.topic: 讲解 _hessian_update_strategy.py 中的 HessianUpdateStrategy 接口及 BFGS、SR1 两种实现，它们被 trust-constr 用于在线近似 Hessian。
learning_goals: 理解 HessianUpdateStrategy 抽象接口（update/multiply/get_matrix）
掌握 BFGS 与 SR1 的更新公式与适用场景（SR1 不保正定）
了解 FullHessianUpdateStrategy 与增量矩阵的维护方式
lectures.practice_task: 实现一段代码：用 BFGS 策略对象对一系列 (s, y) 对执行 update，再调用 get_matrix 与解析 Hessian 比较；改用 SR1 重复，观察非正定行为。

lectures.title: 线搜索与 Wolfe 条件
lectures.topic: 讲解 _linesearch.py 中的 Wolfe1/Wolfe2/Armijo 线搜索、_zoom 二次插值，以及 _dcsrch.py 的 Moré-Thuente 线搜索（DCSRCH/dcstep）和 _bracket.py 的括号机制。
learning_goals: 理解强 Wolfe 条件 c1/c2 与 _check_c1_c2 校验
掌握 scalar_search_wolfe2 与 _zoom 的迭代逻辑
了解 DCSRCH/dcstep 在信赖域方法中的作用
lectures.practice_task: 用 line_search_wolfe2 对一个二次函数沿给定方向求步长，验证是否满足强 Wolfe 条件；再调用 scipy.optimize.line_search 公开接口对比返回的 alpha。

lectures.title: 无导数方法：Nelder-Mead 与 Powell
lectures.topic: 讲解不需要梯度的两种多元方法：Nelder-Mead 单纯形法（_minimize_neldermead）与 Powell 共轭方向法（_minimize_powell 及其内层 _linesearch_powell）。
learning_goals: 理解 Nelder-Mead 单纯形的反射/膨胀/收缩/收缩边操作
掌握 Powell 方法的共轭方向搜索与 _linesearch_powell
了解两种方法的收敛判据（ftol/xtol）与适用场景
lectures.practice_task: 对一个不光滑或含噪声的目标函数分别用 Nelder-Mead 和 Powell 求解，比较收敛轨迹；为 Nelder-Mead 的单纯形变换步骤加上注释。

lectures.title: 梯度法：最速下降 CG 与 BFGS
lectures.topic: 讲解 Polak-Ribière CG（_minimize_cg）与 BFGS 拟牛顿（_minimize_bfgs），它们如何依赖线搜索与梯度（或有限差分梯度）。
learning_goals: 理解 _minimize_cg 的共轭方向更新与重启动策略
掌握 _minimize_bfgs 的逆 Hessian 矩阵迭代更新公式
了解 gtol 收敛判据与 _line_search_wolfe12 的使用
lectures.practice_task: 对 Rosenbrock 函数分别用 CG 和 BFGS 求解，打印梯度范数收敛曲线；手动复现 BFGS 一步逆 Hessian 更新并与库内代码对照。

lectures.title: 牛顿类方法：Newton-CG 与截断牛顿 TNC
lectures.topic: 讲解 Newton-CG（_minimize_newtoncg，用共轭梯度近似解 Newton 方向）与截断牛顿 _tnc.py（对接 C 的 moduleTNC）的实现。
learning_goals: 理解 Newton-CG 如何用 hessp 矩阵向量积避免显式 Hessian
掌握 _minimize_newtoncg 内层 CG 迭代的停机规则（eta 阵）
了解 _tnc.py 与编译扩展 _moduleTNC 的交互与参数映射
lectures.practice_task: 用 Newton-CG 求解 Rosenbrock，分别提供 hess、hessp 与纯有限差分，比较 nfev/nit；阅读 Newton-CG 内层 CG 循环并标注每一步矩阵向量积。

lectures.title: 约束与边界对象：LinearConstraint / NonlinearConstraint / Bounds
lectures.topic: 讲解 _constraints.py 的约束体系：Bounds、LinearConstraint、NonlinearConstraint，以及 PreparedConstraint 如何把约束预处理成求解器可用形式，并处理新旧 bounds 格式转换。
learning_goals: 掌握 Bounds/LinearConstraint/NonlinearConstraint 的构造参数与语义
理解 PreparedConstraint 的预处理（雅可比、边界、稀疏模式）
了解 old_bound_to_new / new_bounds_to_old 等新旧格式互转
lectures.practice_task: 为一个多元函数同时构造 Bounds、LinearConstraint 与 NonlinearConstraint，打印它们的内部表示；追踪 PreparedConstraint 如何在给定 x0 后展开。

lectures.title: SLSQP：序列最小二乘规划
lectures.topic: 讲解 _slsqp_py.py 中 _minimize_slsqp 如何把约束优化转化为一系列 QP 子问题，并对接编译扩展 _slsqplib（来自 src/slsqp.c）。
learning_goals: 理解 SLSQP 把约束问题转化为 QP 子问题序列的思路
掌握 _minimize_slsqp 如何把 bounds/constraints/jac 打包传给 _slsqplib
了解 src/slsqp.c 中 Fortran 移植核心的作用
minimal_modules: 约束到 SLSQP 格式的转换
lectures.practice_task: 用一个带等式与不等式约束的问题调用 minimize(method='SLSQP')，提供解析 jac，观察收敛；再对照 src/slsqp.c 找到主迭代循环。

lectures.title: COBYLA 与 COBYQA：线性与二次近似
lectures.topic: 讲解 _cobyla_py.py（线性近似，对接 Fortran）与 _cobyqa_py.py（二次近似，纯 Python COBYQA 包）两种无导数约束方法。
learning_goals: 理解 COBYLA 用线性逼近目标与约束、维护信赖域半径的思路
掌握 COBYQA 用二次近似改进精度的差异
了解两者在 _minimize.py 分发中的接口与约束处理
lectures.practice_task: 对同一个约束问题分别用 COBYLA 和 COBYQA 求解，比较 nfev 与精度；阅读 _cobyqa_py.py 了解它如何把调用转发到 cobyqa 包。

lectures.title: L-BFGS-B：内存受限拟牛顿与边界约束
lectures.topic: 讲解 _lbfgsb_py.py 中 _minimize_lbfgsb 如何维护有限记忆的 (s,y) 历史近似逆 Hessian，处理变量边界，并对接编译扩展 _lbfgsb（src/lbfgsb.c）与 LbfgsInvHessProduct。
learning_goals: 理解有限记忆 BFGS 的两环递归近似逆 Hessian
掌握 LbfgsInvHessProduct 作为 LinearOperator 暴露 hess_inv 的方式
了解边界投影与 _lbfgsb 扩展的回调/通信
minimal_modules: Callback 形式的有限记忆历史
lectures.practice_task: 用 L-BFGS-B 求解带边界的 Rosenbrock，从 OptimizeResult.hess_inv（LbfgsInvHessProduct）重建近似逆 Hessian 矩阵；调整 m（历史长度）观察内存与精度权衡。

lectures.title: 信赖域方法：dogleg / trust-ncg / trust-exact / trust-krylov
lectures.topic: 讲解 _trustregion.py 的通用信赖域循环（BaseQuadraticSubproblem、_minimize_trust_region）及四种子问题求解器：dogleg、trust-ncg、trust-exact、trust-krylov。
learning_goals: 理解信赖域半径更新与接受/拒绝步长的 dogleg/截断共轭梯度准则
掌握 BaseQuadraticSubproblem 如何构造二次模型 m(p)=f+g·p+½pᵀHp
区分四种方法对子问题的求解策略与对 Hessian 的要求
lectures.practice_task: 对一个有解析 Hessian 的函数分别用 trust-ncg、trust-krylov、trust-exact、dogleg 求解，比较迭代数与信赖域半径变化；在 _trustregion.py 中标注步长接受判据。

lectures.title: trust-constr：约束信赖域与 SQP 子问题
lectures.topic: 讲解 _trustregion_constr/ 包如何把约束优化纳入信赖域框架：约束规范化、等式约束 SQP、QP 子问题求解、投影与内点变体。
learning_goals: 理解 _minimize_trustregion_constr 的主迭代与等式约束 SQP
掌握 canonical_constraint 如何把约束转成规范 (lb,J,ub) 形式
了解 qp_subproblem、projections 与 tr_interior_point 的角色
lectures.practice_task: 用一个含非线性等式+不等式约束的问题用 trust-constr 求解，启用 BFGS 拟牛顿近似 Hessian；阅读 canonical_constraint 追踪约束如何被规范化。

lectures.title: linprog 统一接口与问题预处理
lectures.topic: 讲解 _linprog.py 的 linprog 统一接口、方法分发（highs/simplex/interior-point/revised-simplex），以及 _linprog_util.py 的问题规范化、冗余去除与边界处理。
learning_goals: 掌握 linprog 的标准型与 c/A_ub/b_ub/A_eq/b_eq/bounds 参数
理解方法分发与默认选 HiGHS 的逻辑
了解 _remove_redundancy 与 _parse_linprog 对问题的预处理
lectures.practice_task: 构造一个简单的两变量 LP，用 linprog 默认方法求解，再用 verbose callback 观察迭代；尝试手工制造冗余约束看 _remove_redundancy 的效果。

lectures.title: 求解后端：HiGHS / 单纯形 / 内点法 / 修正单纯形
lectures.topic: 讲解 linprog 四类求解后端的实现：HiGHS（_linprog_highs，推荐）、两阶段单纯形（_linprog_simplex）、原-对偶内点法（_linprog_ip）、修正单纯形（_linprog_rs，含 BGLU）。
learning_goals: 理解 HiGHS 作为默认求解器的调用与 highs_solvers 选项
掌握单纯形与内点法在 LP 上的差异与适用场景
了解 _linprog_rs 中基矩阵更新与 _bglu_dense 的作用
lectures.practice_task: 对同一个 LP 分别用 highs-ds、highs-ipm、simplex、interior-point 求解，比较结果与迭代数；阅读 _linprog_ip 的原-对偶迭代主循环。

lectures.title: 混合整数线性规划 milp
lectures.topic: 讲解 _milp.py 的 milp 接口：integrality、bounds、constraints 如何被打包成 HiGHS 需要的组件，以及 _highspy 包装。
learning_goals: 掌握 milp 的关键字参数与 integrality 向量的语义
理解 _constraints_to_components 与 _milp_iv 的输入校验/转换
了解 milp 与 linprog 在底层都调用 HiGHS 的关系
lectures.practice_task: 把一个经典整数规划（如 0-1 背包的 LP 松弛+整数约束）用 milp 求解，设置部分变量 integrality；对照 _milp_iv 理解输入校验流程。

lectures.title: curve_fit 与 leastsq：MINPACK 求解器
lectures.topic: 讲解 _minpack_py.py 中 curve_fit（带协方差估计）与 leastsq/leastsq（对接编译扩展 _minpack 的 lmder/lmdif）的实现。
learning_goals: 理解 leastsq 如何把残差最小化交给 MINPACK 的 Levenberg-Marquardt
掌握 curve_fit 如何封装 leastsq 并由雅可比估计参数协方差
了解 fsolve 也复用 MINPACK 的 hybrd
lectures.practice_task: 用 curve_fit 拟合一个非线性模型（如指数衰减+常数），打印参数与协方差；手动用 leastsq 实现同样的拟合并比较。

lectures.title: least_squares：TRF / dogbox / lm 三种方法
lectures.topic: 讲解 _lsq/ 包中 least_squares 的统一接口与三种方法：TRF（信赖域反射）、dogbox（狗腿+箱约束）、lm（无界 Levenberg-Marquardt），以及鲁棒损失函数。
learning_goals: 理解 least_squares 的残差模型与三种方法的适用边界（是否有 bounds）
掌握 trf.py 的信赖域反射步长选择与 dogbox.py 的狗腿步
了解 soft_l1/huber/cauchy 等鲁棒损失（rho）的影响
lectures.practice_task: 对一个含离群点的拟合问题，分别用 loss='linear' 与 loss='soft_l1' 的 least_squares 拟合，比较鲁棒性；在有界问题上比较 trf 与 dogbox。

lectures.title: 线性最小二乘：lsq_linear / nnls / isotonic_regression
lectures.topic: 讲解线性最小二乘家族：_lsq/lsq_linear.py 与 bvls.py（有界变量最小二乘）、_nnls.py（非负最小二乘，src/nnls.c）、_isotonic.py（PAVA 保序回归）。
learning_goals: 理解 lsq_linear 用 trf/bvls 求解有界线性最小二乘
掌握 nnls 的 Lawson-Hanson 活动集算法（src/nnls.c）
了解 isotonic_regression 的 PAVA 池合并算法
lectures.practice_task: 构造一个超定线性方程组，分别用 lsq_linear（带 bounds）、nnls、lstsq 求解并比较；对一个单调性约束序列做 isotonic_regression 可视化结果。

lectures.title: root 统一接口与 fsolve / hybr
lectures.topic: 讲解 _root.py 的 root 统一接口、方法分发（hybr/lm/broyden1/.../krylov），以及 _root_leastsq 如何复用 MINPACK 的 hybrd/lmder（fsolve 同源）。
learning_goals: 掌握 root 的参数与 ROOT_METHODS 列表
理解 hybr 与 lm 两种基于 MINPACK 的求根方式
了解 _root_nonlin_solve 如何桥接到 _nonlin 的迭代求解器
lectures.practice_task: 对一个 2D 非线性方程组分别用 root(method='hybr') 和 root(method='lm') 求解，比较 nfev；阅读 _root_leastsq 追踪它如何调用 _minpack。

lectures.title: Broyden / Anderson / Krylov 不动点类族
lectures.topic: 讲解 _nonlin.py 中的不动点迭代求解器类族：nonlin_solve 调度、GenericBroyden/BroydenFirst/BroydenSecond、Anderson、KrylovJacobian、以及简单混合法。
learning_goals: 理解 nonlin_solve 的通用迭代框架与 TerminationCondition
掌握 Broyden 类的低秩逆雅可比更新与 Anderson 加速
了解 KrylovJacobian 用 GMRES 近似解 Newton 方向的大规模适用性
lectures.practice_task: 对一个大规模稀疏非线性方程组分别用 broyden1、anderson、krylov 求解，比较收敛速度与内存；在 _nonlin.py 中标注 Jacobian 基类的 update/matvec 接口。

lectures.title: basinhopping：随机跳跃 + 局部极小
lectures.topic: 讲解 _basinhopping.py 的随机全局优化：BasinHoppingRunner 主循环、Metropolis 接受准则、AdaptiveStepsize 步长自适应、Storage 与可插拔的局部最小化器/取步器。
learning_goals: 理解 basinhopping 用随机扰动+局部最小化跳出局部极小的机制
掌握 Metropolis 接受准则与温度 T 的作用
了解 AdaptiveStepsize 如何动态调整步长以提高接受率
lectures.practice_task: 对一个多井函数用 basinhopping 求全局最小，自定义 take_step 与 accept_test 钩子；观察 AdaptiveStepsize 的步长随迭代变化。

lectures.title: differential_evolution：差分进化
lectures.topic: 讲解 _differentialevolution.py 的 DifferentialEvolutionSolver：种群初始化、变异/交叉/选择策略、收敛判据、并行与 callback，以及 _ConstraintWrapper 如何支持约束。
learning_goals: 理解差分进化的变异（best1bin 等）、二项交叉与贪婪选择
掌握 DifferentialEvolutionSolver 的迭代主循环与收敛 (tol) 机制
了解 workers>1 的并行评估与 _ConstraintWrapper 的处理
lectures.practice_task: 对一个多峰函数用 differential_evolution 求全局最小，对比不同 strategy 与 mutation/recombination 参数；加入一个 NonlinearConstraint 观察 _ConstraintWrapper 的约束投影。

lectures.title: dual_annealing / shgo / direct
lectures.topic: 讲解三种确定性/混合全局优化器：_dual_annealing.py（广义模拟退火+局部搜索）、_shgo.py（单纯同调全局优化）、_direct_py.py（DIRECT 分割矩形，对接编译扩展 _direct）。
learning_goals: 理解 dual_annealing 的访问分布与 StrategyChain 退火链+局部搜索
掌握 shgo 基于单纯复形同调寻找所有局部极小的思路
了解 DIRECT 算法的超矩形分割与 _direct 扩展交互
lectures.practice_task: 对同一个多峰函数分别用 dual_annealing、shgo、direct 求全局最小，比较 nfev 与是否找到全部局部极小（shgo 可返回所有极小）；阅读 shgo 的单纯复形构造代码。

lectures.title: 指派问题：linear_sum_assignment 与 quadratic_assignment
lectures.topic: 讲解组合优化：linear_sum_assignment（_lsap 扩展，基于 rectangular_lsap 的匈牙利/Jonker-Volgenant）与 quadratic_assignment（_qap.py 的 FAQ 谱松弛与 2-opt 局部搜索）。
learning_goals: 理解线性指派问题的代价矩阵与最优匹配
掌握 quadratic_assignment 的 FAQ 方法（双随机谱松弛）与 2-opt
了解 _lsap 扩展与 rectangular_lsap C++ 实现的关系
lectures.practice_task: 构造一个随机代价矩阵用 linear_sum_assignment 求最优指派；再对两个图的 QAP 用 faq 与 2opt 方法求近似解并比较得分。

lectures.title: 逐元素优化与求根：elementwise API
lectures.topic: 讲解 _elementwise.py 提供的向量化逐元素 API：find_minimum、find_root、bracket_minimum、bracket_root，如何对参数数组的每个元素独立求解。
learning_goals: 理解 elementwise API 如何为参数数组每个元素独立求根/求最小
掌握 bracket_root/bracket_minimum 的自动扩区机制
了解 _elementwise 与传统标量 root_scalar/minimize_scalar 的差异
lectures.practice_task: 对一个含参数 θ 的函数，用 find_root 对一组 θ 值数组批量求根，对比逐个调用 root_scalar 的性能；用 bracket_root 自动扩区再求根。

lectures.title: Cython 加速根查找与 C/Fortran 后端
lectures.topic: 讲解 cython_optimize 子包提供的类型化 Cython 标量求根（zeros.FullInverse / Brent 等 .pxd/.pyx）以及 src/ 中的 Fortran 移植 C 后端（minpack、lbfgsb、slsqp、nnls），并回顾 meson.build 的编译组织。
learning_goals: 理解 cython_optimize 如何在 Cython 代码中直接调用 C 级求根例程
掌握 src/ 各 .c 文件对应的经典算法来源（MINPACK/L-BFGS-B/SLSQP）
了解 meson.build 如何把 C/Cython/纯 Python 三层组装成可导入模块
minimal_modules: cython_optimize 的 Cython 求根 API
lectures.practice_task: 写一个最小 .pyx，用 cython_optimize 提供的 Brent 求根器在 Cython 中（nogil）求解一个函数，编译运行；并对照 src/minpack.c 找到 lmdif 主循环的命名约定。

data.head: de190e7fde9d3d34400dbfe1eeacc9fc6d29cede
data.rationale: scipy.optimize 是一个体量大、子领域众多的优化子包，涵盖标量/多元求根、无约束与约束局部优化、线性规划与 MILP、最小二乘与曲线拟合、全局优化、指派问题等，并有大量 C/Fortran/Cython 编译后端。因此学习路线采用「先建立全局认知，再打基础，再分领域深入」的三层结构。单元 1 让读者从零认识模块定位、公共对象与统一调度入口；单元 2 先讲最简单的一维优化与求根，降低门槛；单元 3 集中讲解被几乎所有算法复用的「数值微分 + 函数封装 + 拟牛顿近似」三大基础设施，是理解后续多元算法的关键前置；单元 4 按复杂度递进讲无约束多元方法（线搜索→无导数→梯度法→牛顿类）；单元 5 在约束体系内系统讲解 Bounds/Constraint 对象与 SLSQP/COBYLA/L-BFGS-B/信赖域/trust-constr；单元 6-8 分别覆盖线性规划/MILP、最小二乘与曲线拟合、多元非线性求根这三条相对独立的主链路；单元 9-10 为专家层，讲解全局优化、指派问题、逐元素 API 与 Cython/C 底层加速。讲义之间用 depends_on 明确依赖，确保先修后修顺序，避免读者一开始就陷入底层细节。

lectures.title: 模块定位与公共对象：OptimizeResult 与 show_options
lectures.topic: 介绍 scipy.optimize 的整体能力范围（最小化、求根、线性规划、最小二乘、曲线拟合、指派），并讲解所有求解器共享的公共对象 OptimizeResult、OptimizeWarning 与 show_options。
learning_goals: 理解 scipy.optimize 子包负责解决哪几类数值问题
掌握 OptimizeResult 的结构与字段含义（fun, x, success, message, nfev 等）
知道如何用 show_options 查阅各求解器的可用选项
minimal_modules: __init__.py 的模块文档与 autosummary 列表
lectures.practice_task: 在脚本中调用 show_options('minimize', 'BFGS') 打印 BFGS 的全部选项，再用 rosen 目标函数跑一次 minimize，打印返回的 OptimizeResult 各字段，观察 fun/nfev/nit/success。

lectures.title: 目录结构、构建方式与 C/Cython 后端入口
lectures.topic: 梳理 scipy/optimize 的目录组织，区分纯 Python 实现与编译扩展（minpack、lbfgsb、slsqp、nnls、cython_optimize 等），并通过 meson.build 理解构建入口。
learning_goals: 看懂 optimize 目录下 Python 文件、子目录与 src/ C 源码的分工
理解 meson.build 如何声明各个 py3.extension_module 编译扩展
建立『算法逻辑在 .py、性能核心在 C/Cython』的心智模型
minimal_modules: src/ 下的 .c/.h 文件清单
lectures.practice_task: 阅读 meson.build，列出所有 py3.extension_module 名称及其对应的主要源文件，画一张『扩展名 → 算法 → Python 包装文件』的对照表。

lectures.title: 统一调度入口：minimize 与 minimize_scalar
lectures.topic: 讲解 minimize/minimize_scalar 的函数签名、参数（fun/x0/jac/hess/bounds/constraints/method/options）以及它们如何根据 method 字符串分发到具体的 _minimize_* 实现。
learning_goals: 读懂 minimize 的完整参数列表与各参数含义
理解 MINIMIZE_METHODS 列表与 method.lower() 分发逻辑
知道当 method=None 时如何根据 bounds/constraints 自动选择默认方法
lectures.practice_task: 在 _minimize.py 中追踪 method 默认选择逻辑（无约束选 BFGS、有界选 L-BFGS-B、有约束选 SLSQP），写一段验证脚本：对同一个 rosen 函数分别传 bounds 和 constraints，打印实际选中的 method。

lectures.title: 标量函数最小化：brent / bounded / golden
lectures.topic: 讲解 minimize_scalar 的三种方法：Brent 方法、有界 Brent（bounded）、黄金分割法，以及 BracketError 与回退机制。
learning_goals: 理解 Brent 类如何用抛物线插值 + 黄金分割保护实现一维最小化
区分 _minimize_scalar_bounded 对有界问题的处理
了解 _recover_from_bracket_error 在括号失败时的回退策略
lectures.practice_task: 对 f(x)=(x-2)^2+1 用三种 method 各跑一次 minimize_scalar，比较返回的 nfev/nit 与精度；再尝试一个不易括住的函数观察 BracketError 回退行为。

lectures.title: 标量求根的统一接口 root_scalar
lectures.topic: 讲解 root_scalar 如何根据是否提供 bracket、fprime、fprime2 在 8 种方法（bisect/brentq/brenth/ridder/toms748/newton/secant/halley）中选择，以及 MemoizeDer 缓存机制。
learning_goals: 掌握 root_scalar 的参数与『括号 vs 导数』选法表
理解不同方法的收敛速率与是否保证收敛
了解 MemoizeDer 如何避免重复计算函数与导数
lectures.practice_task: 对 f(x)=cos(x)-x 用括号法（brentq）和非括号法（newton）两种方式调用 root_scalar，对比所需输入与结果；用 MemoizeDer 包装一个同时返回值与导数的函数观察缓存命中。

lectures.title: 一维求根算法实现：bisect / newton / brentq / ridder / toms748
lectures.topic: 深入 _zeros_py.py 中各求根算法的实现细节：二分、牛顿（含向量版 _array_newton）、Brent、Ridder、TOMS748（TOMS748Solver）以及 RootResults。
learning_goals: 理解 bisect/brentq/ridder/toms748 各自的迭代与插值策略
掌握 newton 向量化实现如何同时处理多个初值
了解 RootResults 如何记录根、迭代数与函数调用数
lectures.practice_task: 实现一个自定义的单调函数，分别用 brentq 和 toms748 求根，比较 nit/nfev；阅读 TOMS748Solver 中的逆二次插值代码并写注释说明每一步。

units.title: 导数近似与函数封装基础设施

lectures.title: 数值微分：approx_derivative 与有限差分
lectures.topic: 讲解 _numdiff.py 中的有限差分框架：2-point/3-point/复步（cs）方案、步长与边界自适应调整、稀疏雅可比的列分组（group_columns）。
learning_goals: 理解 approx_derivative 如何对向量函数估计雅可比
掌握 _adjust_scheme_to_bounds 如何让差分点不越界
了解 group_columns 如何减少稀疏雅可比的函数求值次数
lectures.practice_task: 对一个含边界的向量函数 f(x) 用 approx_derivative 分别以 2-point、3-point、cs 计算雅可比并与解析值比较误差；再用 group_columns 对一个稀疏模式的雅可比减少求值。

lectures.title: 可微函数封装：ScalarFunction 与 VectorFunction
lectures.topic: 讲解 _differentiable_functions.py 的核心抽象：ScalarFunction/VectorFunction 如何统一封装『函数值 + 可选解析导数或有限差分导数』，并缓存以避免重复求值。
learning_goals: 理解 ScalarFunction 如何把 fun/jac/hess 统一为带缓存的接口
掌握 VectorFunction 对残差/雅可比的封装与 VectorFunction vs LinearVectorFunction
了解 FD_METHODS 与 _ScalarGradWrapper/_VectorJacWrapper 的作用
lectures.practice_task: 构造一个 ScalarFunction 分别传入解析 jac 与 jac='3-point'，调用多次后检查缓存是否生效；再用 VectorFunction 封装一个最小二乘残差向量并取出雅可比。

lectures.title: 拟牛顿 Hessian 更新策略：BFGS 与 SR1
lectures.topic: 讲解 _hessian_update_strategy.py 中的 HessianUpdateStrategy 接口及 BFGS、SR1 两种实现，它们被 trust-constr 用于在线近似 Hessian。
learning_goals: 理解 HessianUpdateStrategy 抽象接口（update/multiply/get_matrix）
掌握 BFGS 与 SR1 的更新公式与适用场景（SR1 不保正定）
了解 FullHessianUpdateStrategy 与增量矩阵的维护方式
lectures.practice_task: 实现一段代码：用 BFGS 策略对象对一系列 (s, y) 对执行 update，再调用 get_matrix 与解析 Hessian 比较；改用 SR1 重复，观察非正定行为。

lectures.title: 线搜索与 Wolfe 条件
lectures.topic: 讲解 _linesearch.py 中的 Wolfe1/Wolfe2/Armijo 线搜索、_zoom 二次插值，以及 _dcsrch.py 的 Moré-Thuente 线搜索（DCSRCH/dcstep）和 _bracket.py 的括号机制。
learning_goals: 理解强 Wolfe 条件 c1/c2 与 _check_c1_c2 校验
掌握 scalar_search_wolfe2 与 _zoom 的迭代逻辑
了解 DCSRCH/dcstep 在信赖域方法中的作用
lectures.practice_task: 用 line_search_wolfe2 对一个二次函数沿给定方向求步长，验证是否满足强 Wolfe 条件；再调用 scipy.optimize.line_search 公开接口对比返回的 alpha。

lectures.title: 无导数方法：Nelder-Mead 与 Powell
lectures.topic: 讲解不需要梯度的两种多元方法：Nelder-Mead 单纯形法（_minimize_neldermead）与 Powell 共轭方向法（_minimize_powell 及其内层 _linesearch_powell）。
learning_goals: 理解 Nelder-Mead 单纯形的反射/膨胀/收缩/收缩边操作
掌握 Powell 方法的共轭方向搜索与 _linesearch_powell
了解两种方法的收敛判据（ftol/xtol）与适用场景
lectures.practice_task: 对一个不光滑或含噪声的目标函数分别用 Nelder-Mead 和 Powell 求解，比较收敛轨迹；为 Nelder-Mead 的单纯形变换步骤加上注释。

lectures.title: 梯度法：最速下降 CG 与 BFGS
lectures.topic: 讲解 Polak-Ribière CG（_minimize_cg）与 BFGS 拟牛顿（_minimize_bfgs），它们如何依赖线搜索与梯度（或有限差分梯度）。
learning_goals: 理解 _minimize_cg 的共轭方向更新与重启动策略
掌握 _minimize_bfgs 的逆 Hessian 矩阵迭代更新公式
了解 gtol 收敛判据与 _line_search_wolfe12 的使用
lectures.practice_task: 对 Rosenbrock 函数分别用 CG 和 BFGS 求解，打印梯度范数收敛曲线；手动复现 BFGS 一步逆 Hessian 更新并与库内代码对照。

lectures.title: 牛顿类方法：Newton-CG 与截断牛顿 TNC
lectures.topic: 讲解 Newton-CG（_minimize_newtoncg，用共轭梯度近似解 Newton 方向）与截断牛顿 _tnc.py（对接 C 的 moduleTNC）的实现。
learning_goals: 理解 Newton-CG 如何用 hessp 矩阵向量积避免显式 Hessian
掌握 _minimize_newtoncg 内层 CG 迭代的停机规则（eta 阵）
了解 _tnc.py 与编译扩展 _moduleTNC 的交互与参数映射
lectures.practice_task: 用 Newton-CG 求解 Rosenbrock，分别提供 hess、hessp 与纯有限差分，比较 nfev/nit；阅读 Newton-CG 内层 CG 循环并标注每一步矩阵向量积。

lectures.title: 约束与边界对象：LinearConstraint / NonlinearConstraint / Bounds
lectures.topic: 讲解 _constraints.py 的约束体系：Bounds、LinearConstraint、NonlinearConstraint，以及 PreparedConstraint 如何把约束预处理成求解器可用形式，并处理新旧 bounds 格式转换。
learning_goals: 掌握 Bounds/LinearConstraint/NonlinearConstraint 的构造参数与语义
理解 PreparedConstraint 的预处理（雅可比、边界、稀疏模式）
了解 old_bound_to_new / new_bounds_to_old 等新旧格式互转
lectures.practice_task: 为一个多元函数同时构造 Bounds、LinearConstraint 与 NonlinearConstraint，打印它们的内部表示；追踪 PreparedConstraint 如何在给定 x0 后展开。

lectures.title: SLSQP：序列最小二乘规划
lectures.topic: 讲解 _slsqp_py.py 中 _minimize_slsqp 如何把约束优化转化为一系列 QP 子问题，并对接编译扩展 _slsqplib（来自 src/slsqp.c）。
learning_goals: 理解 SLSQP 把约束问题转化为 QP 子问题序列的思路
掌握 _minimize_slsqp 如何把 bounds/constraints/jac 打包传给 _slsqplib
了解 src/slsqp.c 中 Fortran 移植核心的作用
minimal_modules: 约束到 SLSQP 格式的转换
lectures.practice_task: 用一个带等式与不等式约束的问题调用 minimize(method='SLSQP')，提供解析 jac，观察收敛；再对照 src/slsqp.c 找到主迭代循环。

lectures.title: COBYLA 与 COBYQA：线性与二次近似
lectures.topic: 讲解 _cobyla_py.py（线性近似，对接 Fortran）与 _cobyqa_py.py（二次近似，纯 Python COBYQA 包）两种无导数约束方法。
learning_goals: 理解 COBYLA 用线性逼近目标与约束、维护信赖域半径的思路
掌握 COBYQA 用二次近似改进精度的差异
了解两者在 _minimize.py 分发中的接口与约束处理
lectures.practice_task: 对同一个约束问题分别用 COBYLA 和 COBYQA 求解，比较 nfev 与精度；阅读 _cobyqa_py.py 了解它如何把调用转发到 cobyqa 包。

lectures.title: L-BFGS-B：内存受限拟牛顿与边界约束
lectures.topic: 讲解 _lbfgsb_py.py 中 _minimize_lbfgsb 如何维护有限记忆的 (s,y) 历史近似逆 Hessian，处理变量边界，并对接编译扩展 _lbfgsb（src/lbfgsb.c）与 LbfgsInvHessProduct。
learning_goals: 理解有限记忆 BFGS 的两环递归近似逆 Hessian
掌握 LbfgsInvHessProduct 作为 LinearOperator 暴露 hess_inv 的方式
了解边界投影与 _lbfgsb 扩展的回调/通信
minimal_modules: Callback 形式的有限记忆历史
lectures.practice_task: 用 L-BFGS-B 求解带边界的 Rosenbrock，从 OptimizeResult.hess_inv（LbfgsInvHessProduct）重建近似逆 Hessian 矩阵；调整 m（历史长度）观察内存与精度权衡。

lectures.title: 信赖域方法：dogleg / trust-ncg / trust-exact / trust-krylov
lectures.topic: 讲解 _trustregion.py 的通用信赖域循环（BaseQuadraticSubproblem、_minimize_trust_region）及四种子问题求解器：dogleg、trust-ncg、trust-exact、trust-krylov。
learning_goals: 理解信赖域半径更新与接受/拒绝步长的 dogleg/截断共轭梯度准则
掌握 BaseQuadraticSubproblem 如何构造二次模型 m(p)=f+g·p+½pᵀHp
区分四种方法对子问题的求解策略与对 Hessian 的要求
lectures.practice_task: 对一个有解析 Hessian 的函数分别用 trust-ncg、trust-krylov、trust-exact、dogleg 求解，比较迭代数与信赖域半径变化；在 _trustregion.py 中标注步长接受判据。

lectures.title: trust-constr：约束信赖域与 SQP 子问题
lectures.topic: 讲解 _trustregion_constr/ 包如何把约束优化纳入信赖域框架：约束规范化、等式约束 SQP、QP 子问题求解、投影与内点变体。
learning_goals: 理解 _minimize_trustregion_constr 的主迭代与等式约束 SQP
掌握 canonical_constraint 如何把约束转成规范 (lb,J,ub) 形式
了解 qp_subproblem、projections 与 tr_interior_point 的角色
lectures.practice_task: 用一个含非线性等式+不等式约束的问题用 trust-constr 求解，启用 BFGS 拟牛顿近似 Hessian；阅读 canonical_constraint 追踪约束如何被规范化。

lectures.title: linprog 统一接口与问题预处理
lectures.topic: 讲解 _linprog.py 的 linprog 统一接口、方法分发（highs/simplex/interior-point/revised-simplex），以及 _linprog_util.py 的问题规范化、冗余去除与边界处理。
learning_goals: 掌握 linprog 的标准型与 c/A_ub/b_ub/A_eq/b_eq/bounds 参数
理解方法分发与默认选 HiGHS 的逻辑
了解 _remove_redundancy 与 _parse_linprog 对问题的预处理
lectures.practice_task: 构造一个简单的两变量 LP，用 linprog 默认方法求解，再用 verbose callback 观察迭代；尝试手工制造冗余约束看 _remove_redundancy 的效果。

lectures.title: 求解后端：HiGHS / 单纯形 / 内点法 / 修正单纯形
lectures.topic: 讲解 linprog 四类求解后端的实现：HiGHS（_linprog_highs，推荐）、两阶段单纯形（_linprog_simplex）、原-对偶内点法（_linprog_ip）、修正单纯形（_linprog_rs，含 BGLU）。
learning_goals: 理解 HiGHS 作为默认求解器的调用与 highs_solvers 选项
掌握单纯形与内点法在 LP 上的差异与适用场景
了解 _linprog_rs 中基矩阵更新与 _bglu_dense 的作用
lectures.practice_task: 对同一个 LP 分别用 highs-ds、highs-ipm、simplex、interior-point 求解，比较结果与迭代数；阅读 _linprog_ip 的原-对偶迭代主循环。

lectures.title: 混合整数线性规划 milp
lectures.topic: 讲解 _milp.py 的 milp 接口：integrality、bounds、constraints 如何被打包成 HiGHS 需要的组件，以及 _highspy 包装。
learning_goals: 掌握 milp 的关键字参数与 integrality 向量的语义
理解 _constraints_to_components 与 _milp_iv 的输入校验/转换
了解 milp 与 linprog 在底层都调用 HiGHS 的关系
lectures.practice_task: 把一个经典整数规划（如 0-1 背包的 LP 松弛+整数约束）用 milp 求解，设置部分变量 integrality；对照 _milp_iv 理解输入校验流程。

lectures.title: curve_fit 与 leastsq：MINPACK 求解器
lectures.topic: 讲解 _minpack_py.py 中 curve_fit（带协方差估计）与 leastsq/leastsq（对接编译扩展 _minpack 的 lmder/lmdif）的实现。
learning_goals: 理解 leastsq 如何把残差最小化交给 MINPACK 的 Levenberg-Marquardt
掌握 curve_fit 如何封装 leastsq 并由雅可比估计参数协方差
了解 fsolve 也复用 MINPACK 的 hybrd
lectures.practice_task: 用 curve_fit 拟合一个非线性模型（如指数衰减+常数），打印参数与协方差；手动用 leastsq 实现同样的拟合并比较。

lectures.title: least_squares：TRF / dogbox / lm 三种方法
lectures.topic: 讲解 _lsq/ 包中 least_squares 的统一接口与三种方法：TRF（信赖域反射）、dogbox（狗腿+箱约束）、lm（无界 Levenberg-Marquardt），以及鲁棒损失函数。
learning_goals: 理解 least_squares 的残差模型与三种方法的适用边界（是否有 bounds）
掌握 trf.py 的信赖域反射步长选择与 dogbox.py 的狗腿步
了解 soft_l1/huber/cauchy 等鲁棒损失（rho）的影响
lectures.practice_task: 对一个含离群点的拟合问题，分别用 loss='linear' 与 loss='soft_l1' 的 least_squares 拟合，比较鲁棒性；在有界问题上比较 trf 与 dogbox。

lectures.title: 线性最小二乘：lsq_linear / nnls / isotonic_regression
lectures.topic: 讲解线性最小二乘家族：_lsq/lsq_linear.py 与 bvls.py（有界变量最小二乘）、_nnls.py（非负最小二乘，src/nnls.c）、_isotonic.py（PAVA 保序回归）。
learning_goals: 理解 lsq_linear 用 trf/bvls 求解有界线性最小二乘
掌握 nnls 的 Lawson-Hanson 活动集算法（src/nnls.c）
了解 isotonic_regression 的 PAVA 池合并算法
lectures.practice_task: 构造一个超定线性方程组，分别用 lsq_linear（带 bounds）、nnls、lstsq 求解并比较；对一个单调性约束序列做 isotonic_regression 可视化结果。

lectures.title: root 统一接口与 fsolve / hybr
lectures.topic: 讲解 _root.py 的 root 统一接口、方法分发（hybr/lm/broyden1/.../krylov），以及 _root_leastsq 如何复用 MINPACK 的 hybrd/lmder（fsolve 同源）。
learning_goals: 掌握 root 的参数与 ROOT_METHODS 列表
理解 hybr 与 lm 两种基于 MINPACK 的求根方式
了解 _root_nonlin_solve 如何桥接到 _nonlin 的迭代求解器
lectures.practice_task: 对一个 2D 非线性方程组分别用 root(method='hybr') 和 root(method='lm') 求解，比较 nfev；阅读 _root_leastsq 追踪它如何调用 _minpack。

lectures.title: Broyden / Anderson / Krylov 不动点类族
lectures.topic: 讲解 _nonlin.py 中的不动点迭代求解器类族：nonlin_solve 调度、GenericBroyden/BroydenFirst/BroydenSecond、Anderson、KrylovJacobian、以及简单混合法。
learning_goals: 理解 nonlin_solve 的通用迭代框架与 TerminationCondition
掌握 Broyden 类的低秩逆雅可比更新与 Anderson 加速
了解 KrylovJacobian 用 GMRES 近似解 Newton 方向的大规模适用性
lectures.practice_task: 对一个大规模稀疏非线性方程组分别用 broyden1、anderson、krylov 求解，比较收敛速度与内存；在 _nonlin.py 中标注 Jacobian 基类的 update/matvec 接口。

lectures.title: basinhopping：随机跳跃 + 局部极小
lectures.topic: 讲解 _basinhopping.py 的随机全局优化：BasinHoppingRunner 主循环、Metropolis 接受准则、AdaptiveStepsize 步长自适应、Storage 与可插拔的局部最小化器/取步器。
learning_goals: 理解 basinhopping 用随机扰动+局部最小化跳出局部极小的机制
掌握 Metropolis 接受准则与温度 T 的作用
了解 AdaptiveStepsize 如何动态调整步长以提高接受率
lectures.practice_task: 对一个多井函数用 basinhopping 求全局最小，自定义 take_step 与 accept_test 钩子；观察 AdaptiveStepsize 的步长随迭代变化。

lectures.title: differential_evolution：差分进化
lectures.topic: 讲解 _differentialevolution.py 的 DifferentialEvolutionSolver：种群初始化、变异/交叉/选择策略、收敛判据、并行与 callback，以及 _ConstraintWrapper 如何支持约束。
learning_goals: 理解差分进化的变异（best1bin 等）、二项交叉与贪婪选择
掌握 DifferentialEvolutionSolver 的迭代主循环与收敛 (tol) 机制
了解 workers>1 的并行评估与 _ConstraintWrapper 的处理
lectures.practice_task: 对一个多峰函数用 differential_evolution 求全局最小，对比不同 strategy 与 mutation/recombination 参数；加入一个 NonlinearConstraint 观察 _ConstraintWrapper 的约束投影。

lectures.title: dual_annealing / shgo / direct
lectures.topic: 讲解三种确定性/混合全局优化器：_dual_annealing.py（广义模拟退火+局部搜索）、_shgo.py（单纯同调全局优化）、_direct_py.py（DIRECT 分割矩形，对接编译扩展 _direct）。
learning_goals: 理解 dual_annealing 的访问分布与 StrategyChain 退火链+局部搜索
掌握 shgo 基于单纯复形同调寻找所有局部极小的思路
了解 DIRECT 算法的超矩形分割与 _direct 扩展交互
lectures.practice_task: 对同一个多峰函数分别用 dual_annealing、shgo、direct 求全局最小，比较 nfev 与是否找到全部局部极小（shgo 可返回所有极小）；阅读 shgo 的单纯复形构造代码。

lectures.title: 指派问题：linear_sum_assignment 与 quadratic_assignment
lectures.topic: 讲解组合优化：linear_sum_assignment（_lsap 扩展，基于 rectangular_lsap 的匈牙利/Jonker-Volgenant）与 quadratic_assignment（_qap.py 的 FAQ 谱松弛与 2-opt 局部搜索）。
learning_goals: 理解线性指派问题的代价矩阵与最优匹配
掌握 quadratic_assignment 的 FAQ 方法（双随机谱松弛）与 2-opt
了解 _lsap 扩展与 rectangular_lsap C++ 实现的关系
lectures.practice_task: 构造一个随机代价矩阵用 linear_sum_assignment 求最优指派；再对两个图的 QAP 用 faq 与 2opt 方法求近似解并比较得分。

lectures.title: 逐元素优化与求根：elementwise API
lectures.topic: 讲解 _elementwise.py 提供的向量化逐元素 API：find_minimum、find_root、bracket_minimum、bracket_root，如何对参数数组的每个元素独立求解。
learning_goals: 理解 elementwise API 如何为参数数组每个元素独立求根/求最小
掌握 bracket_root/bracket_minimum 的自动扩区机制
了解 _elementwise 与传统标量 root_scalar/minimize_scalar 的差异
lectures.practice_task: 对一个含参数 θ 的函数，用 find_root 对一组 θ 值数组批量求根，对比逐个调用 root_scalar 的性能；用 bracket_root 自动扩区再求根。

lectures.title: Cython 加速根查找与 C/Fortran 后端
lectures.topic: 讲解 cython_optimize 子包提供的类型化 Cython 标量求根（zeros.FullInverse / Brent 等 .pxd/.pyx）以及 src/ 中的 Fortran 移植 C 后端（minpack、lbfgsb、slsqp、nnls），并回顾 meson.build 的编译组织。
learning_goals: 理解 cython_optimize 如何在 Cython 代码中直接调用 C 级求根例程
掌握 src/ 各 .c 文件对应的经典算法来源（MINPACK/L-BFGS-B/SLSQP）
了解 meson.build 如何把 C/Cython/纯 Python 三层组装成可导入模块
minimal_modules: cython_optimize 的 Cython 求根 API
lectures.practice_task: 写一个最小 .pyx，用 cython_optimize 提供的 Brent 求根器在 Cython 中（nogil）求解一个函数，编译运行；并对照 src/minpack.c 找到 lmdif 主循环的命名约定。
